calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
PTJ: Ann Hipshman, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge, Clerk: Marta Vallejo
Bruce Burge, Esq. for Plaintiff Henry Karnilowicz also present.
Louis Rye Porter, present in pro per
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation. (But not read into the record)
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Possession of the premises located at: 226 -6th Street, #29, San Francisco, CA.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Security deposit is forfeited.
If the defendant vacates the premises on or before September 1, 2003, plaintiff waives all back rent, damages and to dismiss the action with prejudice.
Each party waives claim against the other.
Each to bear its own costs and attorney's fees.
Any property left at the premises will be disposed.
If defendant did not comply with the agreement, plaintiff may so state by ex parte declaration, with 24 hours notice to the defendant and have judgment enter.
Defendant waives any right to make a motion to set aside or vacate the judgment, or to apply for a stay or relief from forfeiture.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court. Plaintiff Attorney to reduce it in writing and defendant to sign as to approval, If defendant refuses to sign, Plaintiff is still entitled to judgment.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
